title: Jujutsu Kaisen
description:
Yuji Itadori is a physically gifted high school student who spends his days living normally until he becomes involved with a cursed object connected to dangerous supernatural creatures known as Curses. After swallowing one of the fingers belonging to the powerful Curse Ryomen Sukuna in order to save others, Yuji gains immense power but becomes the host of one of the most feared beings in history. Rather than being immediately executed, he is recruited into Tokyo Jujutsu High, a secret school where sorcerers train to fight deadly Curses.

Together with fellow students Megumi Fushiguro and Nobara Kugisaki under the guidance of the powerful sorcerer Satoru Gojo, Yuji enters a world filled with brutal battles, terrifying enemies, and hidden conspiracies. As stronger Curses and dangerous sorcerers emerge, Yuji struggles with the burden of death, responsibility, and what it truly means to save people. Combining intense action, supernatural powers, emotional storytelling, and spectacular animation, Jujutsu Kaisen delivers a dark and thrilling story about humanity, fear, and sacrifice.
